data.title: "ORIJEN™ Unleashes FRESHPREY, Elevating Fresh Pet Food to New Heights"
data.description: ORIJEN has recently ventured into the realm of fresh pet food with the introduction of FRESHPREY, an innovative line set to establish a new standard in the industry. These biologically appropriate recipes are protein-rich, aligning with the natural dietary needs of pets. To inaugurate this new line, ORIJEN embarked on a journey to the Colorado mountains, reaching heights of 12,000 feet. This venture marks the beginning of "World's Most Extreme" line of pet food products, offering a unique and natural approach to pet nutrition.

data.title: DM20.ai Launches World's First Multi-Model AI Platform Exclusively for Direct Mail Performance Optimization
data.description: DM20.ai has officially launched in Clearwater, Florida on March 5, 2026, providing a unique AI platform powered by Direct Mail Intelligence and advanced models like ChatGPT, Gemini Pro, and Claude Sonnet. This platform is the first of its kind globally and aims to revolutionize the industry.

data.title: Okta Analysts Slash Their Forecasts After Q4 Results
data.description: Okta Inc (NASDAQ: OKTA) reported strong fourth-quarter financial results, with revenue reaching $761 million, surpassing analyst predictions of $748.79 million. Their adjusted earnings for the quarter were 90 cents per share, higher than the expected 85 cents per share. Todd McKinnon, the co-founder and CEO of Okta, highlighted the company's role in addressing the security challenges associated with AI advancements, noting that "AI is redefining the future of software." However, the company's outlook for the first quarter fell below expectations, with projected revenue of $749 million to $753 million compared to estimates of $754.69 million. Adjusted earnings for the upcoming quarter are forecasted to be between 84 and 86 cents per share, lower than the anticipated 87 cents per share. Okta remains focused on addressing the evolving landscape of AI security challenges.

data.title: Orbit International Reports Consolidated Bookings for Month of February 2026 in Excess of $2,100,000
data.description: Simulator Product Solutions LLC subsidiary has secured firm bookings totaling around $1,000,000 for the month of February 2026.

data.title: Autonomix Medical Selected for Best Innovation Competition at CRT 2026
data.description: Autonomix Medical, Inc., a company listed on NASDAQ as AMIX, specializing in precision nerve-targeted medical devices, revealed that its presentation titled "Illuminating The Nervous System With Transvascular Precision-guided Technology" has been chosen for oral presentation at the Best Innovation Competition during the Cardiovascular Research Technologies (CRT) 2026 event. This news was shared from The Woodlands, TX on March 05, 2026.

data.title: Dickey’s Unveils New Big Yellow Cup for 85th Anniversary
data.description: In Dallas, Dickey’s Barbecue Pit is commemorating 85 years of authentic Texas barbecue with a special edition Big Yellow Cup priced at $3.99. This cup pays tribute to the brand's family legacy and iconic yellow color scheme, symbolizing a positive outlook on life. Customers can purchase this limited-edition cup at Dickey’s restaurants in March and April, while supplies are available. Get yours to embrace the spirit of Legit. Texas. Barbecue™ and the brand's rich heritage.

data.title: Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP is investigating potential securities fraud claims on behalf of the shareholders of Driven Brands Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: DRVN)
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP announced an investigation into potential claims by investors of Driven Brands Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: DRVN). The investigation focuses on determining if Driven, along with specific officers, engaged in any misconduct. This news suggests possible financial implications for the company and its stakeholders.

data.title: Motiv8AI Featured in FinTech Futures for Introducing a Human-Centered Approach to AI in Banking
data.description: On March 5, 2026, in Ramat Gan, Israel, Motiv8AI, a behavioral intelligence firm specializing in integrating psychology into digital financial services, was highlighted in FinTech Futures. The company is recognized for its efforts to bring back human empathy in contemporary banking through AI.

data.title: Herc Holdings Inc. to Participate in the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
data.description: In Bonita Springs, Florida, Herc Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HRI), a prominent equipment rental provider in North America under Herc Rentals Inc., shared that President Aaron Birnbaum and Senior VP/Chief Financial Officer Mark Humphrey are set to take part in the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference in Washington, D.C. on March 17, 2026. The event will involve a fireside chat and a live audio webcast.

data.title: Florida’s Finest Customs to Attend Mid-America Trucking Show 2026 in Louisville
data.description: A company specializing in truck accessories, Florida’s Finest Customs, will be present at the Mid-America Trucking Show (MATS) from March 26-28, 2026, at the Kentucky Exposition Center in Louisville, Ken. This event serves as a prime platform to engage with professionals in the trucking sector nationwide. Florida’s Finest Customs will engage with drivers and industry experts during the three-day show to explore interior enhancements and other offerings.

data.title: Lio Raises $30M Series A to Bring Agentic AI to Enterprise Procurement
data.description: A company supported by Andreessen Horowitz is transforming procurement with a virtual workforce that handles purchasing from start to finish. Based in New York, Lio (formerly askLio) is developing an AI platform tailored for enterprise procurement. The announcement was made on March 5, 2026.
